productDisplayName: Disney Kids Boy's Blue Just Cruising Kidswear
description: CompositionBlue sleeveless t-shirt in 100% cotton with broad yellow piping along sleeve cuts and collar, yellow stitch detailing at shoulder panels, below the neck and shirt hem, and Donald Duck print on the chestWash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitThis cool blue Donald Duck tee from disney is perfect for your little boy. Donald will keep him company while he romps around in the park or runs around with his friends. The yellow piping along the sleeves and collar, coupled with stitch detailing along the shoulder panels, hem and below the neck add that stylish twist to this tee. Team it with denim shorts or three quarters for an enjoyable outing or a fun ride on the bicycle after school. Add on footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, and make your handsome young man feel comfortable in style.
